# All In One Home Inspections — Certified Home Inspectors in Maryland, Virginia and DC

> Home inspection company serving the DMV (Maryland, Virginia, and Washington, DC). Thorough inspections, clear reporting, and dependable service — 4.9★ Google rating across 1,400+ reviews. Based in Hollywood, Maryland.

## Business facts

- Company: All In One Home Inspections
- Website: https://allinonehomeinspections.com
- Phone: (301) 373-6430
- Email: office@allinonehomeinspections.com
- Location: Hollywood, MD
- Hours: Mon–Fri 8 AM – 10 PM · Sat–Sun 9 AM – 10 PM
- Service area: Maryland, Virginia, and Washington, DC (the DMV)

## Services

- Standard home inspection with termite (WDI) inspection included
- New construction: Phase III inspections
- Sewer camera inspections
- Add-ons: repair cost estimation, septic inspection, pool inspection, water quality testing (bacteria & total coliforms; lead & nitrate panels), mold inspection

## Pricing

- Standard inspection: $449 for homes up to 2,000 sqft; +$0.16/sqft above 2,000
- Homes over 20 years old: +$50 · Pier-and-beam foundation: +$100
- Add-ons: sewer camera $250, repair cost estimation $100, septic $250, pool $150, water quality test (bacteria & total coliforms) $75, water quality test (bacteria, total coliforms, lead & nitrate) $225, mold inspection $300
- Instant pricing calculator and online scheduling on the homepage
